examples: The processing technique for the mixed healthy beverage was studied through the orthogonal test and the sense assessment.
The extraction of flavone by methanol from sweet carambola leaves was studied by a single factor test and orthogonal design test.
The fermentation conditions of Chaenomeles speciosa S. Nakai wine were optimized by orthogonal experiments.
Pincus: We define product development and innovation in orthogonal way from the traditional gaming industry.
Federal legacy IT system inertia compete with standards and can also be orthogonal to Benchmarked Industry Best Practices.
